allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
✨ Major UI/UX Redesign: Glass Morphism & Water Drop Effects

🎨 Design Changes:
- Replaced purple color scheme with blue gradient (#00d4ff, #0099ff, #0066ff)
- Implemented frosted glass (glassmorphism) effect across all components
- Added water drop ripple animations for enhanced visual appeal
- Removed all border-radius for modern flat design
- Improved scroll progress bar (removed background container)

📱 Responsive Improvements:
- Optimized padding for all screen sizes (5% → 3% → 2% → 5px)
- Full-width components with proper spacing
- Enhanced mobile responsiveness

🔧 Component Updates:
- ResumePage: Glass cards with water ripple effects
- Header: Glassmorphism with animated water drops
- Skills: Frosted glass tiles with hover animations
- ContactPage: Glass effect with gradient text
- ThemeToggle: Glass button design
- Navigation: Sticky glass navbar with backdrop blur

✨ Removed Features:
- Download Resume button (as requested)
- Purple/violet color scheme
- Rounded corners on cards

🎭 Effects Added:
- Water drop ripple animations on all major sections
- Backdrop blur with saturation boost
- Gradient text effects
- Smooth hover transitions with glass effect enhancement

🧩 Generated with Claude Code
Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
